title: Vilfa arenaria
taxonomy: Vilfa arenaria is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It belongs to the tribe Hordeae, which includes various species of grasses. Within the tribe Hordeae, Vilfa arenaria is further categorized into the genus Vilfa, which is a monotypic genus containing only the species V. arenaria. The species V. arenaria is native to South America, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom. Further classification within the plant kingdom includes the kingdom Plantae, and the division Magnoliophyta, which encompasses flowering plants.
